channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead tree now taken down (twigs and branches left all over lawn) but now lawn has tree stump - this is a trip hazard and also does not allow for easy mowing of this area! Please remove asap., 8th April
item.description:
59 Kempton Grove, GL51 0JU

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Kempton Grove, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 inch pothole adjacent to 161 salisbury avenue. Bus causing house to shake on this and broken drainage run across the road!, 8th April
item.description:
Outside of 161 Salisbury Avenue Warden Hill GL51 3DG. Thanks for prompt fill and make good action. Cllr cc
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Salisbury Avenue, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drainage pipe exposed due to damaged pavement, 8th April
item.description:
Hi there - the rain drainage pipe outside my house is exposed due to the pavement being damaged and the pipe is also now damaged. Is it your responsibility to fix this? Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Millbrook Street, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Flytipped items, 8th April
item.description:
Halfway up White Hart Street there is parts of a bed, a small suitcase, wooden panels, and large cement blocks flytipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, White Hart Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal fire ash/debris, 8th April
item.description:
Needs clearing as blocking the path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cassin Drive, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste bags, 8th April
item.description:
Bags of small gas bottles on the bank.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhay Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Litter in brook, 8th April
item.description:
Lots of litter in brook Glass and plastic bottles, broken chair, footballs, plastic I'm concerned for the wildlife and dogs that go in the brook. Children also play in this area. It has been like this for many months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter in street or public area

item.title: When are going to fix this?, 8th April
item.description:
Dangerous road to drive on. This has been reported so many times and no one is doing anything about it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 8th April
item.description:
Depression CW 1500x600x40mm approx 2 way lights Stats X 4 NSD (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:
Perm for ENWD Patch required, incorporating ENWD pothole CW 1800x1200x40mm 2 way lights Stats (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:
NWD 15 MINUTES DELAY BOARDS carriage way pothole 800x900x75mm with tarmac number 1 MAKE SAFE (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:
15MDB CWPH 800 X 800 X 60MM Not MARKED (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:
Permanent repair 2 way stop and go carriage way pothole 2000x650x40mm with tarmac stats required (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 8th April
item.description:
Rattling Cover Please Investigate Road Closure (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation growing onto pavement, 8th April
item.description:
There is a significant reduction to the width of the pavement along sections of the bypass which is a shared path/cycleway. This makes it very difficult for it to be shared safely by cyclists and pedestrians. There are sections where approx 3ft width of the path has been lost to overgrown vegetation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:
CWPH 600 x 500 x 65mm Road Closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
